hero.lede: Code as calligraphy. Precise, intentional, readable.

works.title: The Handscroll
works.subtitle: Three pieces pulled from the studio notebook.

skills.title: The Stroke
skills.subtitle: The gesture, the tool, the mark it leaves.

now.subtitle: What I believe in when I build.

i.label: The Way
i.text: Learning to learn, for life. Every project is a lesson, never an end.

ii.label: The Heart
ii.text: Build what I'd want to use. If I wouldn't open it tomorrow, it doesn't deserve to exist.

iii.label: The Craft
iii.text: Quality shows, so does sloppiness. The invisible detail is the signature.

iv.label: The Word
iv.text: Promise rarely, deliver always. A kept deadline is worth a thousand speeches.

v.label: The Human
v.text: User first, algorithm second. Team before solo prowess.

final.title: Correspondence
final.subtitle: Leave a word. I read everything, I rarely reply fast, never late.
final.error: Send failed. Try again shortly, or reach out via LinkedIn.

validation.name: Your name (2 characters min)
validation.message: A little longer, please — I read carefully (20 characters min)

notFound.lede: This page slipped off the handscroll. Let's return to the prologue.

masterScroll.title: Master Scroll
masterScroll.lede: You found a folded parchment at the bottom of a chest.
